issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to show the previous LO's name instead of the newly assigned one. The affected deal showed Paul instead of Julie Yocum in agent-facing emails. The issue was identified as a product-side problem and was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect LO name during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not suppressing when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral check-in tasks instead of halting workflow activity. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these deal stages as suppression criteria. A tweak to the filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually delete any post-referral tasks that were generated after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to an earlier stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria did not include Offer Accepted. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling into TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or generating tasks for transaction coordinators. HAs were manually sending closing info emails as a workaround. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed the issue was fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately 2026-03-14 and 2026-04-01 into the TC workflow and send closing info emails manually.
